name: Basic Attack
description: A canonical ability bridge to ordinary weapon or natural attack behavior.

name: Power Strike
description: A stamina-consuming physical technique that strikes a same-room enemy harder than a basic attack.

messages.hit_self: You drive a power strike into {target} for {damage} damage.
messages.fail_self: You lack the stamina or target for Power Strike.

name: Defensive Stance
description: Assume a guarded stance and gain a temporary fortification effect.

messages.effect_self: You settle into a defensive stance.

name: Minor Heal
description: Restore a small amount of health to yourself or an ally. It cannot revive the dead.

messages.heal_self: You call gentle light and restore {healing} health.

messages.refresh_self: You are already affected by Bless; it is renewed.

name: Poison Bite
description: A natural monster bite that deals piercing damage and applies poison.

name: Wolf Howl
description: A room-ally buff foundation for wolves; no AI execution is introduced.

name: Fleeing Step
description: A utility placeholder for future flee integration.

name: Set Camp
description: Establish a modest campsite in your current room.

plugin_data.help: SET CAMP establishes a persistent campsite here.
plugin_data.success_message: You establish a modest campsite here.

name: Build Campfire
description: Build a simple campfire at an established campsite.

plugin_data.help: BUILD CAMPFIRE creates a persistent campfire object after you set camp.

name: Recall
description: Return safely to the configured recall point.

plugin_data.help: CAST RECALL returns you to the world recall point.
plugin_data.casting_text: You speak the old wayhome word and silver light gathers around you.
plugin_data.arrival_text: The silver light fades as you arrive at the recall point.

messages.complete_self: You bind wounds with a clean bandage.

plugin_data.success_message: You bind wounds with a clean bandage.

messages.complete_self: You move to rescue your ally.

plugin_data.success_message: You move to rescue your ally.

messages.actor_success: You move to rescue your ally.

messages.complete_self: You study the trail and find a likely direction.

plugin_data.success_message: You study the trail and find a likely direction.

messages.actor_success: You study the trail and find a likely direction.

messages.refresh_self: You are already affected by Armor; it is renewed.
You are already affected by Strength; it is renewed.

messages.complete_self: The world seems to slow around you.

plugin_data.success_message: The world seems to slow around you.

messages.actor_success: The world seems to slow around you.
messages.refresh_self: You are already affected by Haste; it is renewed.
You are already affected by Invisibility; it is renewed.
You are already affected by Detect Invisibility; it is renewed.
You are already affected by Detect Magic; it is renewed.
You are already affected by Detect Alignment; it is renewed.
messages.expire_self: Your sense of moral auras fades.

messages.refresh_self: You are already affected by Sanctuary; it is renewed.
You are already affected by Fly; it is renewed.
messages.expire_self: You drift gently to the ground.

messages.refresh_self: You are already affected by Waterwalk; it is renewed.

messages.complete_self: You call darkness over your target.

plugin_data.success_message: You call darkness over your target.

messages.actor_success: You call darkness over your target.

messages.complete_self: You draw poison from the target.

plugin_data.success_message: You draw poison from the target.

messages.actor_success: You draw poison from the target.

messages.complete_self: You restore sight to the target.

plugin_data.success_message: You restore sight to the target.

messages.actor_success: You restore sight to the target.
